cards.name:
Hi, I'm Piri, and I make Kinopio.

I believe in building software that's economically-sustainable and built-to-last. Kinopio is 100% funded and made possible by people like you.

Email me anytime at [hi@kinopio.club](mailto:hi@kinopio.club)
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jfKfPfyJRdk
